title: SGLang v0.5.10 Engine Configuration
description: Configuration schema for SGLang v0.5.10 engine_args. Field names match SGLang launch_server CLI flag names verbatim (kebab-case) so values flow through to argparse without transformation. Source of truth: SGLang ServerArgs at the v0.5.10 release.

tp-size.description: Tensor parallel size. Number of GPUs across which model tensors are sharded.

dp-size.description: Data parallel size. Number of independent replicas of the model.

pp-size.description: Pipeline parallel size. Number of pipeline stages.

dtype.description: Data type for model weights and activations.

trust-remote-code.description: Trust remote code from Hugging Face hub.

is-embedding.description: Run the model as an embedding (or reranker) model rather than a generative one.

served-model-name.description: Override the model name reported by /v1/models and used as the chat-completion response.model. The K8s deploy template auto-supplies this from ModelArgs.serve_name; setting it via engine_args wins by argparse last-flag semantics.

mem-fraction-static.description: Fraction of GPU memory reserved for static allocation (model weights, KV cache pool).

max-running-requests.description: Upper bound on concurrent in-flight requests.

max-total-tokens.description: Maximum total tokens (prompt + generation) the engine will allocate KV cache for.

max-prefill-tokens.description: Maximum tokens processed in a single prefill batch.

chunked-prefill-size.description: Chunk size for chunked-prefill. -1 disables chunking.

schedule-conservativeness.description: Multiplier on memory headroom estimate; lower is more aggressive.

disable-cuda-graph.description: Disable CUDA graph capture (useful for debugging or unsupported models).

cuda-graph-max-bs.description: Maximum batch size to capture CUDA graphs for.

preferred-sampling-params.description: Default sampling params applied when client request omits them. Passed as JSON object.

json-model-override-args.description: Override fields on the Hugging Face model config (e.g. max_position_embeddings, rope_scaling). Passed as JSON object.

chat-template.description: Override chat template (Jinja string or built-in name like 'chatml').

tool-call-parser.description: Parser for tool/function-call output during streaming.

reasoning-parser.description: Parser for reasoning content (thinking traces) during streaming.

log-requests.description: Log each incoming request body to stdout.
